content.content:
1→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
     2→# Libraries
     3→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
     4→library(rvest)
     5→library(dplyr)
     6→library(purrr)
     7→library(stringr)
     8→library(tidyr)
     9→library(glmnet)
    10→library(explor)
    11→library(FactoMineR)
    12→library(ade4)
    13→library(psych)
    14→library(GPArotation)
    15→library(httr)
    16→
    17→
    18→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    19→# 1. Helper Constants
    20→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    21→
    22→DEFAULT_REVIEW_CATEGORIES <- c(
    23→  "Power", "Serves", "Control", "Groundstrokes", "Maneuverability", "Returns",
    24→  "Stability", "Slice", "Comfort", "Topspin", "Touch/Feel", "Volleys"
    25→)
    26→
    27→DEFAULT_SPECNAMES <- c(
    28→  "Length", "Head Size", "Weight", "Balance Point",
    29→  "Construction", "Composition", "String Pattern"
    30→)
    31→
    32→# Additional hard-coded links in original code:
    33→DEFAULT_ADDITIONAL_LINKS <- c(
    34→  "https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/learning_center/racquet_reviews/PRGOSreview.html",
    35→  "https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/learning_center/racquet_reviews/97V13Rreview.html",
    36→  "https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/learning_center/racquet_reviews/PS97RFreview.html",
    37→  "https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/learning_center/racquet_reviews/P97CVreview.html",
    38→  "https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/learning_center/racquet_reviews/wblxbtreview.html",
    39→  "https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/learning_center/racquet_reviews/hyigroreview.html"
    40→)
    41→
    42→# Corresponding additional model, brand, code
    43→DEFAULT_ADDITIONAL_MODELS <- c(
    44→  "Prince Original Graphite 107",
    45→  "Wilson Pro Staff RF97 v13",
    46→  "Wilson Pro Staff RF97 Autograph",
    47→  "Wilson Pro Staff 97 Countervail",
    48→  "Wilson BLX Blade Tour",
    49→  "Head Youtek IG Radical OS"
    50→)
    51→
    52→DEFAULT_ADDITIONAL_CODES  <- c("PRGO", "97V13", "PS97R", "PS97CV", "WBLXBT", "HYIGRO")
    53→DEFAULT_ADDITIONAL_BRANDS <- c("Prince", "Wilson", "Wilson", "Wilson", "Wilson", "Head")
    54→
    55→
    56→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    57→# 2. get_tw_racquet_links
    58→#    Scrape the main Tennis Warehouse page for racquet links and attributes.
    59→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
    60→#' @title Get Tennis Warehouse Racquet Links
    61→#' @description Scrapes the Tennis Warehouse "reviewedracquets.html" page for
    62→#'   initial sets of racquet model names, brand, code, and links.
    63→#' @param url The URL to the Tennis Warehouse main racquet review listing.
    64→#' @return A data frame with columns: \code{model}, \code{brand}, \code{code}, \code{link}
    65→#' @title Discover Tennis Warehouse Racquet Reviews
    66→#' @description Attempts to find all racquet review pages from the sitemap and the main
    67→#'   reviews listing page, returning a tibble with (model, brand, code, link).
    68→discover_racquet_reviews <- function() {
    69→  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    70→  # 1) Discover links from the sitemap
    71→  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    72→  sitemap_url  <- "https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/sitemap.xml"
    73→  sitemap_resp <- GET(sitemap_url)
    74→  sitemap_links <- character(0)
    75→
    76→  if (status_code(sitemap_resp) == 200) {
    77→    sitemap_xml <- read_xml(content(sitemap_resp, as = "text", encoding = "UTF-8"))
    78→    all_urls <- xml_find_all(sitemap_xml, ".//loc") %>% xml_text()
    79→
    80→    # Filter for URLs that contain /learning_center/racquet_reviews/
    81→    sitemap_links <- all_urls[str_detect(all_urls, "/learning_center/racquet_reviews/")]
    82→  } else {
    83→    message("Sitemap not found or inaccessible.")
    84→  }
    85→
    86→  # We'll create a tibble for these. We don't have brand/model from the sitemap,
    87→  # so set them to NA. We can parse the 'code' from the URL, but keep in mind
    88→  # the substring might not match the gtm_impression_code from the main page exactly.
    89→  df_sitemap <- tibble(
    90→    model = NA_character_,
    91→    brand = NA_character_,
    92→    # Example code extraction (if you want a code column):
    93→    code  = str_extract(sitemap_links, "(?<=racquet_reviews/)[^/]+(?=.html)"),
    94→    link  = sitemap_links
    95→  )
    96→
    97→  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
    98→  # 2) Scrape the main "reviewedracquets.html" page for brand, model, code
    99→  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   100→  main_page_url <- "https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/reviewedracquets.html"
   101→  main_page <- tryCatch(read_html(main_page_url), error = function(e) NULL)
   102→
   103→  df_main <- tibble(model = character(0), brand = character(0), code = character(0), link = character(0))
   104→
   105→  if (!is.null(main_page)) {
   106→    # Extract brand, model, code from data-gtm_impression attributes
   107→    impression_nodes <- main_page %>% html_nodes("div.cattable-wrap-cell.gtm_impression")
   108→
   109→    brands <- impression_nodes %>% html_attr("data-gtm_impression_brand")
   110→    models <- impression_nodes %>% html_attr("data-gtm_impression_name")
   111→    codes  <- impression_nodes %>% html_attr("data-gtm_impression_code")
   112→
   113→    # Extract actual links from the relevant container
   114→    link_nodes <- main_page %>%
   115→      html_nodes("div.cattable-wrap-cell-imgwrap.is-racquet") %>%
   116→      html_nodes("a") %>%
   117→      html_attr("href")
   118→
   119→    links <- paste0("https://www.tennis-warehouse.com", link_nodes)
   120→
   121→    # Combine into a tibble
   122→    df_main <- tibble(
   123→      model = models,
   124→      brand = brands,
   125→      code  = codes,
   126→      link  = links
   127→    )
   128→  } else {
   129→    message("Failed to scrape main reviews page.")
   130→  }
   131→
   132→  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   133→  # 3) Combine both sets of results, remove duplicates, clean the 'link' column
   134→  # -------------------------------------------------------------------------
   135→  df_out <- bind_rows(df_sitemap, df_main) %>%
   136→    mutate(
   137→      # Remove any carriage returns/newlines from link,
   138→      # then trim any leading/trailing whitespace.
   139→      link = link %>%
   140→        str_replace_all("[\r\n]", "") %>%
   141→        str_trim()
   142→    ) %>%
   143→    distinct(link, .keep_all = TRUE)
   144→
   145→  return(df_out)
   146→}
   147→
   148→#' @title Get Tennis Warehouse Racquet Links from CSV
   149→#' @description Reads racquet data from a CSV file instead of scraping the Tennis Warehouse website.
   150→#' @param filename A string specifying the path to the CSV file.
   151→#' @return A tibble/data frame with columns: \code{model}, \code{brand}, \code{code}, \code{link}
   152→#' @examples
   153→#' \dontrun{
   154→#'   # Example usage:
   155→#'   # get_tw_racquet_links_from_csv("racquets.csv")
   156→#' }
   157→get_tw_racquet_links_from_csv <- function(filename) {
   158→  # Ensure required packages are loaded
   159→  library(readr)
   160→  library(dplyr)
   161→  library(stringr)
   162→
   163→  # Read the CSV into a data frame/tibble
   164→  df <- read_csv(filename, show_col_types = FALSE)
   165→
   166→  # The CSV is assumed to have columns Brand, Model, and Review Page URL
   167→  # Rename columns to match the output specification (model, brand, code, link)
   168→  df <- df %>%
   169→    rename(
   170→      brand = Brand,
   171→      model = Model,
   172→      link  = `Review Page URL`
   173→    ) %>%
   174→    # Create a code column by parsing the link.
   175→    # This extracts everything between "racquet_reviews/" and ".html".
   176→    mutate(
   177→      code = str_extract(link, "(?<=racquet_reviews/)[^/]+(?=.html)")
   178→    ) %>%
   179→    select(model, brand, code, link)
   180→
   181→  df
   182→}
   183→
   184→
   185→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   186→# 3. append_additional_links
   187→#    Append any additional hard-coded or user-supplied links to the main data.
   188→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   189→#' @title Append Additional Racquet Links
   190→#' @description Augments the existing link data frame with manually specified
   191→#'   racquet reviews (not listed in the main page).
   192→#' @param df A data frame from \code{get_tw_racquet_links} with columns:
   193→#'   \code{model}, \code{brand}, \code{code}, \code{link}.
   194→#' @param additional_links Vector of URLs for extra racquets.
   195→#' @param additional_models Vector of model names for extra racquets.
   196→#' @param additional_brands Vector of brand names for extra racquets.
   197→#' @param additional_codes Vector of codes for extra racquets.
   198→#' @return A combined data frame with appended rows.
   199→append_additional_links <- function(
   200→    df,
   201→    additional_links  = DEFAULT_ADDITIONAL_LINKS,
   202→    additional_models = DEFAULT_ADDITIONAL_MODELS,
   203→    additional_brands = DEFAULT_ADDITIONAL_BRANDS,
   204→    additional_codes  = DEFAULT_ADDITIONAL_CODES
   205→) {
   206→  # Create a tibble from additional specs
   207→  df_extra <- tibble(
   208→    model = additional_models,
   209→    brand = additional_brands,
   210→    code  = additional_codes,
   211→    link  = additional_links
   212→  )
   213→
   214→  # Combine
   215→  bind_rows(df, df_extra)
   216→}
   217→
   218→# A helper function that cleans the URL and retrieves the HTML document.
   219→get_clean_html <- function(link) {
   220→  # Remove any carriage returns or newlines from the URL
   221→  cleaned_link <- str_trim(str_replace_all(link, "[\r\n]", ""))
   222→
   223→  # Use httr::GET with a custom User-Agent
   224→  response <- GET(cleaned_link, add_headers("User-Agent" = "Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64)"))
   225→
   226→  # Check if the request succeeded
   227→  if (status_code(response) == 200) {
   228→    read_html(response)
   229→  } else {
   230→    message("Failed to retrieve: ", cleaned_link)
   231→    NULL
   232→  }
   233→}
   234→
   235→
   236→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   237→# 4. parse_racquet_review
   238→#    Given a single racquet review URL & info, scrape all relevant data.
   239→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   240→#' @title Parse a Single Racquet Review Page
   241→#' @description Scrapes the tennis-warehouse racquet review page for overall
   242→#'   rating scores, individual testers' scores, specs, etc.
   243→#'
   244→#' @param link Full URL to the review page.
   245→#' @param model Model name of the racquet.
   246→#' @param brand Brand name of the racquet.
   247→#' @param code  Some unique code for the racquet (e.g. product code).
   248→#' @param review_categories The categories in which the racquet is rated (default includes
   249→#'   "Power", "Serves", etc.).
   250→#' @param specnames Vector of specification labels to look for (default includes
   251→#'   length, head size, weight, etc.).
   252→#'
   253→#' @return A \code{tibble} with columns:
   254→#'   \item{player}{player/tester name}
   255→#'   \item{category}{category of rating (e.g. "Power", "Control", etc.)}
   256→#'   \item{score}{score from 1-10 or so}
   257→#'   \item{model, code, brand}{metadata for the racquet}
   258→#'   \item{flex, swingweight}{RDC machine flex rating and swingweight}
   259→#'   \item{length, head_size, weight, balance, construction, material, string_pattern}{extracted specs}
   260→old_parse_racquet_review <- function(
   261→    link,
   262→    model,
   263→    brand,
   264→    code,
   265→    review_categories = DEFAULT_REVIEW_CATEGORIES,
   266→    specnames         = DEFAULT_SPECNAMES
   267→) {
   268→  message(blue("==== Starting parse_racquet_review for link:"), green(link))
   269→
   270→  # Use get_clean_html() to clean the URL and retrieve the HTML document.
   271→  doc <- get_clean_html(link)
   272→  if (is.null(doc)) {
   273→    message(red("Failed to retrieve HTML for link:"), link)
   274→    return(tibble())
   275→  }
   276→
   277→  #---------------------- 4.1 Retrieve Basic Scores --------------------------------
   278→  message(yellow("Extracting basic scores using primary selector..."))
   279→  snames <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.scores tr th") %>% html_text()
   280→  svals  <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.scores tr td") %>% html_text()
   281→
   282→  if (length(snames) == 0) {
   283→    message(yellow("Primary basic scores not found. Trying fallback (div.review_scores)..."))
   284→    sall <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.review_scores tr td") %>% html_text()
   285→    if (length(sall) != 0) {
   286→      snames <- sall[seq(1, length(sall), by = 2)]
   287→      svals  <- sall[seq(2, length(sall), by = 2)]
   288→    }
   289→  }
   290→
   291→  if (length(snames) == 0) {
   292→    message(yellow("Fallback 1 failed. Trying fallback (div.scores table)..."))
   293→    sall <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.scores table tr td") %>% html_text()
   294→    if (length(sall) != 0) {
   295→      snames <- sall[seq(1, length(sall), by = 2)]
   296→      svals  <- sall[seq(2, length(sall), by = 2)]
   297→    }
   298→    if (length(snames) == 0) {
   299→      message(yellow("Fallback 2 failed. Trying fallback (div.score_box)..."))
   300→      sall <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.score_box tr td") %>% html_text()
   301→      if (length(sall) != 0) {
   302→        snames <- sall[seq(1, length(sall), by = 2)]
   303→        svals  <- sall[seq(2, length(sall), by = 2)]
   304→      }
   305→    }
   306→  }
   307→
   308→  message(green("Basic scores extracted:"), length(snames), " entries found.")
   309→
   310→  #---------------------- 4.2 Retrieve RDC Ratings (Flex, Swing Weight) -----------
   311→  message(yellow("Extracting RDC ratings..."))
   312→  rdc_ratings <- doc %>%
   313→    html_nodes("table.racquet_rate_table") %>%
   314→    html_nodes("td") %>%
   315→    html_text2(preserve_nbsp = TRUE)
   316→
   317→  if (length(rdc_ratings) == 0) {
   318→    message(yellow("Primary RDC ratings not found. Trying fallback (table td table font)..."))
   319→    rdc_ratings <- doc %>%
   320→      html_nodes("table td table") %>%
   321→      html_nodes("font") %>%
   322→      html_text2(preserve_nbsp = TRUE)
   323→    ind1 <- grep("Flex Rating", rdc_ratings)
   324→    ind2 <- grep("Swing Weight", rdc_ratings)
   325→    rdc_ratings <- rdc_ratings[c(ind1 + 1, ind2 + 1)]
   326→  } else {
   327→    tval <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(rdc_ratings[2]))
   328→    if (!is.na(tval) && tval < 80 & tval > 40) {
   329→      message(yellow("Assuming RDC ratings are in positions 2 and 4."))
   330→      rdc_ratings <- rdc_ratings[c(2, 4)]
   331→    } else {
   332→      message(yellow("Searching RDC ratings for labels..."))
   333→      ind1 <- grep("Flex Rating", rdc_ratings)
   334→      ind2 <- grep("Swing Weight", rdc_ratings)
   335→      rdc_ratings <- rdc_ratings[c(ind1 + 1, ind2 + 1)]
   336→    }
   337→  }
   338→
   339→  message(green("RDC ratings extracted: Flex = "), green(rdc_ratings[1]),
   340→          green(" | Swing Weight = "), green(rdc_ratings[2]))
   341→
   342→  #---------------------- 4.3 Retrieve Specs ---------------------------------------
   343→  message(yellow("Extracting racquet specs..."))
   344→  specs <- doc %>%
   345→    html_nodes("table.racquet_specs_table") %>%
   346→    html_nodes("tr td") %>%
   347→    html_text()
   348→
   349→  if (length(specs) == 0) {
   350→    message(yellow("Specs not found with primary selector. Trying alternative selector..."))
   351→    specs <- doc %>%
   352→      html_nodes("#main_content > center > table > tr > td:nth-child(1)") %>%
   353→      html_text2(preserve_nbsp = TRUE)
   354→    specs <- try(str_split(specs, "[\t\n]")[[1]], silent = TRUE)
   355→    if (inherits(specs, "try-error") || is.null(specs)) {
   356→      message(yellow("Alternative selector failed. Trying (center > table > tr > td:nth-child(1))"))
   357→      specs <- doc %>%
   358→        html_nodes("center > table > tr > td:nth-child(1)") %>%
   359→        html_text2(preserve_nbsp = TRUE)
   360→      specs <- try(str_split(specs, "[\t\n]")[[1]], silent = TRUE)
   361→    }
   362→  }
   363→
   364→  message(green("Specs extracted, length: "), green(length(specs)))
   365→
   366→  #---------------------- 4.4 Individual Player Scores -----------------------------
   367→  message(yellow("Extracting individual tester scores..."))
   368→  indiv <- doc %>%
   369→    html_nodes("div.individ_scores") %>%
   370→    html_nodes("div.tablewrap") %>%
   371→    html_nodes("table")
   372→  if (length(indiv) == 0) {
   373→    message(yellow("No tables found with primary individual tester selector. Trying fallback (.tablewrap)..."))
   374→    indiv <- doc %>% html_nodes(".tablewrap") %>% html_nodes("table")
   375→  }
   376→
   377→  message(green("Found "), green(length(indiv)), green(" individual score tables."))
   378→
   379→  indiv_data <- lapply(indiv, function(x) {
   380→    sname <- x %>% html_nodes("tr th") %>% html_text()
   381→    sname <- iconv(sname, from = 'UTF-8', to = 'ASCII//TRANSLIT')
   382→    sname <- gsub("Chris' Scores", "Chris", sname)
   383→    sname <- gsub("Tiffani' Scores", "Tiffani", sname)
   384→    sname <- gsub("James' Scores", "James", sname)
   385→    sname <- gsub("Z'sofia", "Zsofia", sname)
   386→    sname <- gsub("'$", "", sname)
   387→    sname <- str_trim(gsub("'s Scores", "", sname))
   388→
   389→    message(blue("Parsing individual scores for tester: "), sname)
   390→
   391→    sval <- x %>% html_nodes("tr td") %>% html_text()
   392→    scores <- sapply(review_categories, function(cat) {
   393→      gind <- grep(cat, sval)
   394→      if (length(gind) > 0) {
   395→        sval[gind + 1]
   396→      } else {
   397→        NA
   398→      }
   399→    })
   400→
   401→    tibble(
   402→      player   = sname,
   403→      category = review_categories,
   404→      score    = scores
   405→    )
   406→  }) %>% bind_rows()
   407→
   408→  #---------------------- 4.5 Clean up Specs, match "specnames" --------------------
   409→  message(yellow("Cleaning up specs..."))
   410→  specvals <- NA
   411→  if (!is.null(specs) && !inherits(specs, "try-error")) {
   412→    if (length(specs) == 10) {
   413→      spind <- grep("/", specs)
   414→      construction <- grep("mm", specs)[1]
   415→      specvals <- specs[c(1, 3, 5, 7, construction, construction + 1, spind[length(spind)])]
   416→    } else if (length(specs) == 11) {
   417→      construction <- grep("mm", specs)[1]
   418→      spind <- grep("/", specs)
   419→      specvals <- specs[c(1, 3, 5, 7, construction, construction + 1, spind[length(spind)])]
   420→    } else {
   421→      specvals <- lapply(specnames, function(sp) {
   422→        gind <- grep(sp, specs)
   423→        if (length(gind) > 0) {
   424→          specs[gind + 1]
   425→        } else {
   426→          NA
   427→        }
   428→      })
   429→    }
   430→  }
   431→
   432→  if (length(specvals) != 7) {
   433→    tmp <- rep(NA, 7)
   434→    tmp[seq_len(min(7, length(specvals)))] <- specvals[seq_len(min(7, length(specvals)))]
   435→    specvals <- tmp
   436→  }
   437→
   438→  message(green("Spec values cleaned."))
   439→
   440→  #---------------------- 4.6 Build final data -------------------------------------
   441→  if (length(rdc_ratings) < 2) {
   442→    rdc_ratings <- rep(NA, 2)
   443→  }
   444→
   445→  # Convert flex and swingweight to numeric to ensure consistency
   446→  result <- indiv_data %>%
   447→    mutate(
   448→      model = model,
   449→      code = code,
   450→      brand = brand,
   451→      flex = as.numeric(rdc_ratings[1]),
   452→      swingweight = as.numeric(rdc_ratings[2]),
   453→      length = specvals[[1]],
   454→      head_size = specvals[[2]],
   455→      weight = specvals[[3]],
   456→      balance = specvals[[4]],
   457→      construction = specvals[[5]],
   458→      material = specvals[[6]],
   459→      string_pattern = specvals[[7]]
   460→    )
   461→
   462→  message(blue("==== Finished parsing link:"), green(link))
   463→  return(result)
   464→}
   465→
   466→
   467→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   468→# 4. parse_racquet_review
   469→#    Given a single racquet review URL & info, scrape all relevant data.
   470→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   471→#' @title Parse a Single Racquet Review Page
   472→#' @description Scrapes the tennis-warehouse racquet review page for overall
   473→#'   rating scores, individual testers' scores, specs, etc. If the older style
   474→#'   layout fails, tries the newer layout (as used on pages like YV98Preview.html).
   475→#'
   476→#' @param link Full URL to the review page.
   477→#' @param model Model name of the racquet.
   478→#' @param brand Brand name of the racquet.
   479→#' @param code  Some unique code for the racquet (e.g. product code).
   480→#' @param review_categories The categories in which the racquet is rated
   481→#'   (default includes "Power", "Serves", etc.). (Used mainly for older pages.)
   482→#' @param specnames Vector of specification labels to look for (default includes
   483→#'   length, head size, weight, etc.). (Used mainly for older pages.)
   484→#'
   485→#' @return A \code{tibble} with columns:
   486→#'   \item{player}{player/tester name}
   487→#'   \item{category}{category of rating (e.g. "Power", "Control", etc.)}
   488→#'   \item{score}{score from 1-10 or so}
   489→#'   \item{model, code, brand}{metadata for the racquet}
   490→#'   \item{flex, swingweight}{RDC machine flex rating and swingweight}
   491→#'   \item{length, head_size, weight, balance, construction, material, string_pattern}{extracted specs}
   492→#'
   493→#' @examples
   494→#' \dontrun{
   495→#'   df <- parse_racquet_review("https://www.tennis-warehouse.com/learning_center/racquet_reviews/YV98Preview.html",
   496→#'                              model="Yonex VCORE 98+ Racquet",
   497→#'                              brand="Yonex",
   498→#'                              code="YV98P")
   499→#' }
   500→#'
   501→parse_racquet_review <- function(
   502→    link,
   503→    model,
   504→    brand,
   505→    code,
   506→    review_categories = DEFAULT_REVIEW_CATEGORIES,
   507→    specnames         = DEFAULT_SPECNAMES
   508→) {
   509→  message(blue("==== Starting parse_racquet_review for link:"), green(link))
   510→
   511→  # Use get_clean_html() to clean the URL and retrieve the HTML document.
   512→  doc <- get_clean_html(link)
   513→  if (is.null(doc)) {
   514→    message(red("Failed to retrieve HTML for link:"), link)
   515→    return(tibble())
   516→  }
   517→
   518→  #------------------------------------------------------------
   519→  # 1) Attempt OLD-STYLE parse as in your original code
   520→  #------------------------------------------------------------
   521→  message(yellow("Extracting basic scores using primary selector (old style)..."))
   522→
   523→  snames <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.scores tr th") %>% html_text()
   524→  svals  <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.scores tr td") %>% html_text()
   525→
   526→  if (length(snames) == 0) {
   527→    message(yellow("Primary basic scores not found. Trying fallback (div.review_scores)..."))
   528→    sall <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.review_scores tr td") %>% html_text()
   529→    if (length(sall) != 0) {
   530→      snames <- sall[seq(1, length(sall), by = 2)]
   531→      svals  <- sall[seq(2, length(sall), by = 2)]
   532→    }
   533→  }
   534→
   535→  if (length(snames) == 0) {
   536→    message(yellow("Fallback 1 failed. Trying fallback (div.scores table)..."))
   537→    sall <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.scores table tr td") %>% html_text()
   538→    if (length(sall) != 0) {
   539→      snames <- sall[seq(1, length(sall), by = 2)]
   540→      svals  <- sall[seq(2, length(sall), by = 2)]
   541→    }
   542→    if (length(snames) == 0) {
   543→      message(yellow("Fallback 2 failed. Trying fallback (div.score_box)..."))
   544→      sall <- doc %>% html_nodes("div.score_box tr td") %>% html_text()
   545→      if (length(sall) != 0) {
   546→        snames <- sall[seq(1, length(sall), by = 2)]
   547→        svals  <- sall[seq(2, length(sall), by = 2)]
   548→      }
   549→    }
   550→  }
   551→  oldstyle_count <- length(snames)
   552→  message(green("Old-style basic scores extracted:"), oldstyle_count, " entries found.")
   553→
   554→  # Attempt to build old-style table if possible
   555→  old_style_data <- tibble(player="TW Staff",
   556→                           category=snames,
   557→                           score=svals)
   558→
   559→  #---------------------- Old-style RDC ratings -----------
   560→  message(yellow("Extracting old-style RDC ratings..."))
   561→  rdc_ratings <- doc %>%
   562→    html_nodes("table.racquet_rate_table") %>%
   563→    html_nodes("td") %>%
   564→    html_text2(preserve_nbsp = TRUE)
   565→
   566→  if (length(rdc_ratings) == 0) {
   567→    message(yellow("Primary RDC ratings not found. Trying fallback (table td table font)..."))
   568→    rdc_ratings <- doc %>%
   569→      html_nodes("table td table") %>%
   570→      html_nodes("font") %>%
   571→      html_text2(preserve_nbsp = TRUE)
   572→    ind1 <- grep("Flex Rating", rdc_ratings)
   573→    ind2 <- grep("Swing Weight", rdc_ratings)
   574→    if (length(ind1) && length(ind2)) {
   575→      rdc_ratings <- rdc_ratings[c(ind1 + 1, ind2 + 1)]
   576→    }
   577→  } else {
   578→    tval <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(rdc_ratings[2]))
   579→    if (!is.na(tval) && tval < 80 & tval > 40) {
   580→      # Assume RDC ratings in positions 2 and 4
   581→      if (length(rdc_ratings) >= 4) {
   582→        rdc_ratings <- rdc_ratings[c(2, 4)]
   583→      }
   584→    } else {
   585→      message(yellow("Searching RDC ratings for labels..."))
   586→      ind1 <- grep("Flex Rating", rdc_ratings)
   587→      ind2 <- grep("Swing Weight", rdc_ratings)
   588→      if (length(ind1) && length(ind2)) {
   589→        rdc_ratings <- rdc_ratings[c(ind1 + 1, ind2 + 1)]
   590→      }
   591→    }
   592→  }
   593→  if (length(rdc_ratings) < 2) {
   594→    rdc_ratings <- rep(NA, 2)
   595→  }
   596→  # For old style, parse specs from table.racquet_specs_table
   597→  # (We keep your original fallback logic.)
   598→  message(yellow("Extracting specs (old style)..."))
   599→  specs <- doc %>%
   600→    html_nodes("table.racquet_specs_table") %>%
   601→    html_nodes("tr td") %>%
   602→    html_text()
   603→
   604→  if (length(specs) == 0) {
   605→    message(yellow("Specs not found with primary old-style selector. Trying alternative selector..."))
   606→    specs <- doc %>%
   607→      html_nodes("#main_content > center > table > tr > td:nth-child(1)") %>%
   608→      html_text2(preserve_nbsp = TRUE)
   609→    specs <- try(str_split(specs, "[\t\n]")[[1]], silent = TRUE)
   610→    if (inherits(specs, "try-error") || is.null(specs)) {
   611→      message(yellow("Alternative old-style spec selector also failing."))
   612→    }
   613→  }
   614→
   615→  # Attempt to parse old-style specs
   616→  specvals <- NA
   617→  if (!is.null(specs) && !inherits(specs, "try-error") && length(specs)>1) {
   618→    # Your original snippet for old spec parse
   619→    if (length(specs) == 10) {
   620→      spind <- grep("/", specs)
   621→      construction <- grep("mm", specs)[1]
   622→      specvals <- specs[c(1, 3, 5, 7, construction, construction + 1, spind[length(spind)])]
   623→    } else if (length(specs) == 11) {
   624→      construction <- grep("mm", specs)[1]
   625→      spind <- grep("/", specs)
   626→      specvals <- specs[c(1, 3, 5, 7, construction, construction + 1, spind[length(spind)])]
   627→    } else {
   628→      specvals <- lapply(specnames, function(sp) {
   629→        gind <- grep(sp, specs)
   630→        if (length(gind) > 0) {
   631→          specs[gind + 1]
   632→        } else {
   633→          NA
   634→        }
   635→      })
   636→    }
   637→  }
   638→  if (length(specvals) != 7) {
   639→    tmp <- rep(NA, 7)
   640→    if (!is.na(specvals[1])) {
   641→      # fill up what we can
   642→      nn <- min(7, length(specvals))
   643→      tmp[seq_len(nn)] <- specvals[seq_len(nn)]
   644→    }
   645→    specvals <- tmp
   646→  }
   647→
   648→  # Build old-style final:
   649→  old_style_final <- old_style_data %>%
   650→    mutate(
   651→      model = model,
   652→      code = code,
   653→      brand = brand,
   654→      flex = as.numeric(rdc_ratings[1]),
   655→      swingweight = as.numeric(rdc_ratings[2]),
   656→      length = specvals[[1]],
   657→      head_size = specvals[[2]],
   658→      weight = specvals[[3]],
   659→      balance = specvals[[4]],
   660→      construction = specvals[[5]],
   661→      material = specvals[[6]],
   662→      string_pattern = specvals[[7]]
   663→    )
   664→
   665→  # If old_style_data has 0 categories, we likely have an empty parse
   666→  # Check how many unique categories we found:
   667→  if (nrow(old_style_final) > 0 && any(!is.na(old_style_final$category))) {
   668→    # We have data from old style
   669→    message(green("Successfully parsed old style. Returning old_style_final."))
   670→    return(old_style_final)
   671→  }
   672→
   673→  #------------------------------------------------------------
   674→  # 2) Attempt NEW-STYLE parse if old style yields zero rows
   675→  #------------------------------------------------------------
   676→  message(yellow("No data from old style parse. Trying new style..."))
   677→
   678→  # a) Try to parse "TWU Lab Data" for flex/swingweight
   679→  flex <- NA_real_
   680→  swingweight <- NA_real_
   681→  lab_tbl <- doc %>% html_node("#table_data table.table-borderless")
   682→  if (!is.null(lab_tbl)) {
   683→    rows <- lab_tbl %>% html_nodes("tr")
   684→    # each row: [ "Flex Rating", "66", "MEDIUM" ] or so
   685→    for (rr in seq_along(rows)) {
   686→      tds <- rows[[rr]] %>% html_nodes("td") %>% html_text(trim=TRUE)
   687→      if (length(tds)>=2) {
   688→        if (grepl("Flex", tds[1], ignore.case=TRUE)) {
   689→          flex <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(tds[2]))
   690→        }
   691→        if (grepl("Swing Weight", tds[1], ignore.case=TRUE)) {
   692→          swingweight <- suppressWarnings(as.numeric(tds[2]))
   693→        }
   694→      }
   695→    }
   696→  }
   697→
   698→  # b) Parse "Tech Specs" from #tech_specs #US
   699→  length_ <- NA_character_
   700→  head_size_ <- NA_character_
   701→  weight_ <- NA_character_
   702→  balance_ <- NA_character_
   703→  construction_ <- NA_character_
   704→  material_ <- NA_character_
   705→  string_pat_ <- NA_character_
   706→
   707→  us_table <- doc %>% html_node("#tech_specs #US table")
   708→  if (!is.null(us_table)) {
   709→    spec_rows <- us_table %>% html_nodes("tr")
   710→    specs_df <- lapply(spec_rows, function(r) {
   711→      tds <- r %>% html_nodes("td") %>% html_text(trim=TRUE)
   712→      if (length(tds) == 2) {
   713→        data.frame(name=tds[1], val=tds[2], stringsAsFactors=FALSE)
   714→      } else {
   715→        NULL
   716→      }
   717→    }) %>% dplyr::bind_rows()
   718→
   719→    # match known fields
   720→    if (nrow(specs_df) > 0) {
   721→      getVal <- function(pattern) {
   722→        idx <- which(grepl(pattern, specs_df$name, ignore.case=TRUE))
   723→        if (length(idx)) specs_df$val[idx[1]] else NA_character_
   724→      }
   725→      length_       <- getVal("^Length")
   726→      head_size_    <- getVal("^Head Size")
   727→      weight_       <- getVal("^Weight")
   728→      balance_      <- getVal("^Balance")
   729→      construction_ <- getVal("^Construction")
   730→      string_pat_   <- getVal("^String Pattern")
   731→      # material is typically not listed in new style pages, so it remains NA
   732→    }
   733→  }
   734→
   735→  # c) Breakdown summary staff line (#breakdown_summary table with categories)
   736→  breakdown_tbl <- doc %>% html_node("#breakdown_summary table")
   737→  breakdown_data <- tibble()
   738→  if (!is.null(breakdown_tbl)) {
   739→    b_rows <- breakdown_tbl %>% html_nodes("tr")
   740→    breakdown_data <- lapply(b_rows, function(rr) {
   741→      tds <- rr %>% html_nodes("td") %>% html_text(trim=TRUE)
   742→      if (length(tds)==2) {
   743→        # skip if it's "Final Verdict"
   744→        if (!grepl("Final Verdict", tds[1], ignore.case=TRUE)) {
   745→          tibble(player="TW Staff", category=tds[1], score=tds[2])
   746→        } else {NULL}
   747→      } else {NULL}
   748→    }) %>% dplyr::bind_rows()
   749→  }
   750→
   751→  # d) Individual testers => .review-playtesters_section
   752→  pt_sections <- doc %>% html_nodes(".review-playtesters_section")
   753→  testers_data <- lapply(pt_sections, function(sec) {
   754→    # parse name from:  <div id="BRITTANYB"><h2 class="mb-1">Brittany</h2>
   755→    # or <h2>whatever
   756→    name_node <- sec %>% html_node("h2.mb-1")
   757→    if (is.null(name_node)) {
   758→      name_node <- sec %>% html_node("h2")
   759→    }
   760→    p_name <- if (!is.null(name_node)) html_text(name_node, trim=TRUE) else "UnknownTester"
   761→
   762→    # parse that small table below
   763→    tab <- sec %>% html_node("table.table-borderless")
   764→    if (is.null(tab)) return(NULL)
   765→
   766→    rows_ <- tab %>% html_nodes("tr")
   767→    out_ <- lapply(rows_, function(r) {
   768→      tds <- r %>% html_nodes("td") %>% html_text(trim=TRUE)
   769→      if (length(tds)==2) {
   770→        tibble(player=p_name,
   771→               category=tds[1],
   772→               score=tds[2])
   773→      } else {
   774→        NULL
   775→      }
   776→    }) %>% dplyr::bind_rows()
   777→    out_
   778→  }) %>% dplyr::bind_rows()
   779→
   780→  newstyle_data <- dplyr::bind_rows(breakdown_data, testers_data)
   781→
   782→  if (nrow(newstyle_data)==0) {
   783→    message(yellow("New-style parse also found 0 data. Returning empty tibble."))
   784→    return(tibble())
   785→  }
   786→
   787→  # e) Build final
   788→  out <- newstyle_data %>%
   789→    mutate(
   790→      model = model,
   791→      code  = code,
   792→      brand = brand,
   793→      flex = flex,
   794→      swingweight = swingweight,
   795→      length = length_,
   796→      head_size = head_size_,
   797→      weight = weight_,
   798→      balance = balance_,
   799→      construction = construction_,
   800→      material = material_,
   801→      string_pattern = string_pat_
   802→    )
   803→
   804→  message(blue("==== Finished parsing link:"), green(link))
   805→  return(out)
   806→}
   807→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   808→# 5. scrape_all_racquet_reviews
   809→#    Loop over all the racquet links, parse each one, and combine.
   810→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   811→#' @title Scrape All Racquet Reviews
   812→#' @description Iterates over a data frame of links, brand, model, code, calls
   813→#'   \code{parse_racquet_review} for each, and combines the results.
   814→#' @param df A data frame with columns: \code{model}, \code{brand}, \code{code}, \code{link}.
   815→#' @return A single \code{tibble} with all racquet data combined.
   816→scrape_all_racquet_reviews <- function(df) {
   817→  # Print starting message
   818→  message(crayon::blue("Starting to scrape all racquet reviews..."))
   819→
   820→  # Step 1: Loop over rows and parse each review
   821→  results_list <- vector("list", nrow(df))
   822→  for (i in seq_len(nrow(df))) {
   823→    message(crayon::green("Scraping "),
   824→            crayon::cyan(i),
   825→            " of ",
   826→            crayon::cyan(nrow(df)),
   827→            " : ",
   828→            crayon::yellow(df$link[i]))
   829→    results_list[[i]] <- parse_racquet_review(
   830→      link  = df$link[i],
   831→      model = df$model[i],
   832→      brand = df$brand[i],
   833→      code  = df$code[i]
   834→    )
   835→  }
   836→
   837→  # Step 2: Bind the individual results into one tibble
   838→  message(crayon::blue("Finished individual scrapes. Binding rows..."))
   839→  results <- dplyr::bind_rows(results_list)
   840→
   841→  message(crayon::blue("Scraping complete."))
   842→  return(results)
   843→}
   844→
   845→
   846→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   847→# 6. compute_player_statistics
   848→#    For each racquet, compute per-player "delta" from average, correlation to
   849→#    average, global mean rating, etc.
   850→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   851→#' @title Compute Player Statistics
   852→#' @description For each model, splits the data by player and computes:
   853→#'  \item{delta}{the sum of squared deviations from the model-level average}
   854→#'  \item{cor}{Spearman correlation with the model-level average}
   855→#'  \item{global}{the average rating across all categories for that player & model}
   856→#' @param reviews A tibble with columns \code{model}, \code{player}, \code{score}.
   857→#' @return A tibble with columns \code{player}, \code{delta}, \code{cor}, \code{global}, \code{model}.
   858→compute_player_statistics <- function(reviews) {
   859→
   860→  mnest <- reviews %>%
   861→    nest_by(model)
   862→
   863→  player_ret <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(mnest)), function(i) {
   864→    dat  <- mnest$data[[i]]
   865→    mod  <- mnest$model[i]
   866→
   867→    # Build numeric matrix of category scores, row = player
   868→    scores <- split(dat, dat$player) %>%
   869→      map(function(x) as.numeric(x$score))
   870→
   871→    players <- names(scores)
   872→    smat    <- do.call(rbind, scores)
   873→    smat    <- as.matrix(smat)
   874→
   875→    # Fix any >10 scores
   876→    smat[smat > 10] <- smat[smat > 10] / 10
   877→
   878→    # Model-level average by column
   879→    avg  <- colMeans(smat, na.rm = TRUE)
   880→
   881→    # Sum of squared deviations from average (by player)
   882→    delta <- apply(smat, 1, function(vals) sum((vals - avg)^2, na.rm=TRUE))
   883→    # Spearman correlation with average
   884→    cor   <- apply(smat, 1, function(vals) cor(vals, avg, method = "spearman", use="pairwise.complete.obs"))
   885→
   886→    # Global average rating for each player across categories
   887→    global <- rowMeans(smat, na.rm=TRUE)
   888→
   889→    data.frame(
   890→      player = players,
   891→      delta  = delta,
   892→      cor    = cor,
   893→      global = global,
   894→      model  = mod
   895→    )
   896→  }) %>%
   897→    bind_rows()
   898→
   899→  return(player_ret)
   900→}
   901→
   902→
   903→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   904→# 7. aggregate_player_stats
   905→#    Summarize each player across all racquets.
   906→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   907→#' @title Aggregate Player Statistics
   908→#' @description Summarizes a player's \code{delta}, \code{cor}, and \code{global}
   909→#'   across all racquets tested, then ranks the players with a \code{weightfac} metric.
   910→#' @param player_ret A tibble from \code{compute_player_statistics}.
   911→#' @return A tibble with columns:
   912→#'   \item{player}{player name}
   913→#'   \item{global}{average rating across racquets}
   914→#'   \item{cor}{average correlation with racquet-level average}
   915→#'   \item{delta}{average sum of squares from racquet-level average}
   916→#'   \item{count}{how many racquets tested}
   917→#'   \item{weightfac}{a combined factor used to weigh the player’s scoring}
   918→aggregate_player_stats <- function(player_ret) {
   919→
   920→  player_ret_sum <- player_ret %>%
   921→    group_by(player) %>%
   922→    summarize(
   923→      global = mean(global, na.rm=TRUE),
   924→      cor    = mean(cor, na.rm=TRUE),
   925→      delta  = mean(delta, na.rm=TRUE),
   926→      count  = n()
   927→    ) %>%
   928→    arrange(desc(cor)) %>%
   929→    mutate(
   930→      weightfac = (
   931→        scale(0.5 * rank(cor))[,1] +
   932→          0.5 * scale(1 / rank(delta))[,1] +
   933→          2   * scale(rank(count))[,1]
   934→      ) / 3
   935→    ) %>%
   936→    arrange(desc(weightfac))
   937→
   938→  return(player_ret_sum)
   939→}
   940→
   941→
   942→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   943→# 8. join_player_stats
   944→#    Join the player statistics back onto the main data.
   945→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   946→#' @title Join Player Statistics
   947→#' @description Merges \code{player_ret_sum} back into the main \code{reviews}
   948→#'   data so each row has \code{weightfac}, \code{global}, etc.
   949→#' @param reviews The main reviews tibble.
   950→#' @param player_stats A tibble from \code{aggregate_player_stats}.
   951→#' @return The combined tibble with \code{weightfac} appended.
   952→join_player_stats <- function(reviews, player_stats) {
   953→  ret <- inner_join(reviews, player_stats, by = "player")
   954→  return(ret)
   955→}
   956→
   957→
   958→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   959→# 9. compute_weighted_scores_by_model
   960→#    For each model, compute weighted average category scores using the
   961→#    'weightfac' as weights.
   962→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
   963→#' @title Compute Weighted Scores By Model
   964→#' @description For each racquet model, aggregates individual player
   965→#'   category scores using a weighted mean (weight = pnorm(weightfac)).
   966→#' @param reviews_with_stats A tibble that includes \code{model}, \code{player},
   967→#'   \code{score}, and \code{weightfac}.
   968→#' @return A tibble with columns: \code{model}, \code{avgscore}, \code{category}.
   969→compute_weighted_scores_by_model <- function(reviews_with_stats) {
   970→
   971→  avg_scores <- reviews_with_stats %>%
   972→    nest_by(model)
   973→
   974→  res <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(avg_scores)), function(i) {
   975→    dat <- avg_scores$data[[i]]
   976→    mod <- avg_scores$model[i]
   977→
   978→    # scores: row = player, col = categories
   979→    scores_split <- split(dat, dat$player)
   980→    scores_list  <- map(scores_split, ~ as.numeric(.x$score))
   981→    wts          <- map_dbl(scores_split, ~ as.numeric(.x$weightfac[1]))
   982→
   983→    # Convert weightfac to a range ~ (0.0 - 1.0) using pnorm
   984→    wts <- pnorm(wts)
   985→
   986→    # smat: each row is a player, each column is a category
   987→    smat <- do.call(rbind, scores_list)
   988→    smat <- as.matrix(smat)
   989→    smat[smat > 10] <- smat[smat > 10] / 10  # fix out-of-range
   990→
   991→    # Weighted average across players, for each category (column)
   992→    # The tricky part is ensuring we line up categories. We'll assume each player
   993→    # row is in the same category order. If not, we'd need to reorder carefully.
   994→    # But from the nest_by approach, the row order is consistent across players.
   995→    avgcat <- apply(smat, 2, function(vals) weighted.mean(vals, wts, na.rm=TRUE))
   996→
   997→    # The categories come from the first block of data
   998→    categories <- dat$category[1:ncol(smat)]
   999→
  1000→    tibble(
  1001→      model    = mod,
  1002→      avgscore = avgcat,
  1003→      category = categories
  1004→    )
  1005→  }) %>%
  1006→    bind_rows()
  1007→
  1008→  res
  1009→}
  1010→
  1011→
  1012→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  1013→# 10. finalize_data
  1014→#    Summarize the final average scores with relevant specs and produce a
  1015→#    "long" format tibble or any final arrangement needed.
  1016→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  1017→#' @title Finalize Data
  1018→#' @description Joins the weighted average scores with racquet specs to produce
  1019→#'   a final per-model, per-category summary.
  1020→#' @param reviews_with_stats The original reviews data (with specs).
  1021→#' @param weighted_scores Weighted average scores from \code{compute_weighted_scores_by_model}.
  1022→#' @return A final tibble with columns:
  1023→#'   \item{model, category, score, code, brand, flex, swingweight, length, head_size, weight, ...}
  1024→finalize_data <- function(reviews_with_stats, weighted_scores) {
  1025→
  1026→  finalavg <- left_join(reviews_with_stats, weighted_scores, by = c("model", "category")) %>%
  1027→    group_by(model, category) %>%
  1028→    summarize(
  1029→      score         = mean(avgscore, na.rm = TRUE),
  1030→      code          = code[1],
  1031→      brand         = brand[1],
  1032→      flex          = flex[1],
  1033→      swingweight   = swingweight[1],
  1034→      length        = length[1],
  1035→      head_size     = head_size[1],
  1036→      weight        = weight[1],
  1037→      balance       = balance[1],
  1038→      construction  = construction[1],
  1039→      material      = material[1],
  1040→      string_pattern= string_pattern[1],
  1041→      .groups = "drop"
  1042→    )
  1043→
  1044→  # Return
  1045→  finalavg
  1046→}
  1047→
  1048→
  1049→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  1050→# 11. Helper function to standardize numeric columns of final data
  1051→#    Example: adding thickness, mains, crosses, etc.
  1052→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  1053→#' @title Post-process specs
  1054→#' @description Example function to derive extra numeric columns (e.g. thickness)
  1055→#' @param finalavg A tibble from \code{finalize_data}.
  1056→#' @return The same tibble with new numeric columns (thickness, mains, crosses, balance_inches).
  1057→post_process_specs <- function(finalavg) {
  1058→
  1059→  out <- finalavg %>%
  1060→    mutate(
  1061→      thickness = {
  1062→        tmp <- str_split(str_replace_all(construction, "mm", ""), "/")
  1063→        sapply(tmp, function(x) mean(as.numeric(x), na.rm = TRUE))
  1064→      },
  1065→      mains = {
  1066→        tmp <- str_split(string_pattern, "/")
  1067→        unlist(lapply(tmp, function(x) {
  1068→          vals <- as.numeric(str_replace(x, "([a-zA-Z].*)", ""))
  1069→          vals[[1]]
  1070→        }))
  1071→      },
  1072→      crosses = {
  1073→        tmp <- str_split(string_pattern, "/")
  1074→        unlist(lapply(tmp, function(x) {
  1075→          vals <- as.numeric(str_replace(x, "([a-zA-Z].*)", ""))
  1076→          vals[[2]]
  1077→        }))
  1078→      },
  1079→      balance_inches = {
  1080→        bp2 <- str_split(balance, "in")
  1081→        bp2 <- lapply(bp2, `[[`, 1)
  1082→        as.numeric(bp2)
  1083→      }
  1084→    )
  1085→
  1086→  out
  1087→}
  1088→
  1089→
  1090→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  1091→# Example Main Script
  1092→#~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~~
  1093→
  1094→# 1) Get main page links
  1095→#racquet_df <- get_tw_racquet_links_from_csv("racquets.csv")
  1096→racquet_df <- discover_racquet_reviews()
  1097→# 2) Append any additional (hard-coded) links
  1098→racquet_df <- append_additional_links(racquet_df)
  1099→
  1100→# 3) Scrape all reviews into one table
  1101→reviews <- scrape_all_racquet_reviews(racquet_df)
  1102→
  1103→# 4) Compute player-level statistics (delta, cor, global)
  1104→player_ret <- compute_player_statistics(reviews)
  1105→
  1106→# 5) Aggregate those player stats across all racquets
  1107→player_ret_sum <- aggregate_player_stats(player_ret)
  1108→
  1109→# 6) Join them back into the main table
  1110→reviews_with_stats <- join_player_stats(reviews, player_ret_sum)
  1111→
  1112→# 7) Compute weighted average category scores for each racquet model
  1113→weighted_scores <- compute_weighted_scores_by_model(reviews_with_stats)
  1114→
  1115→# 8) Build final data with specs
  1116→finalavg <- finalize_data(reviews_with_stats, weighted_scores)
  1117→
  1118→# 9) Optionally post-process specs (thickness, mains, crosses, balance_inches, etc.)
  1119→finalavg <- post_process_specs(finalavg)
  1120→
  1121→# finalavg now contains the aggregated & processed data
  1122→# at the (model, category) level, plus derived numeric specs.
  1123→
  1124→# You can now proceed with modeling or other analysis:
  1125→# e.g., correlation analyses, PCA, factor analysis, GLMNET modeling, etc.
  1126→
